'''dhajaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oogram|oogram]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oogram|oogram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhajaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæjæyæth|dhæjæyæth]] || [[word:dhæjæyæj|dhæjæyæj]] || [[word:dhæjæyæsh|dhæjæyæsh]] || [[word:dhæjæyæ|dhæjæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhajajayath|dhajajayath]] || [[word:dhajajayaj|dhajajayaj]] || [[word:dhajajayash|dhajajayash]] || [[word:dhajajaya|dhajajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhajayath|dhajayath]] || [[word:dhajayaj|dhajayaj]] || [[word:dhajayash|dhajayash]] || [[word:dhajaya|dhajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhajafyath|dhajafyath]] || [[word:dhajafyaj|dhajafyaj]] || [[word:dhajafyash|dhajafyash]] || [[word:dhajafyaf|dhajafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhajayatha|dhajayatha]] || [[word:dhajayaja|dhajayaja]] || [[word:dhajayasha|dhajayasha]] || [[word:dhajayaka|dhajayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhajayath|dhajayath]] || [[word:dhajayaj|dhajayaj]] || [[word:dhajayash|dhajayash]] || [[word:dhajaya|dhajaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhajayathal|dhajayathal]] || [[word:dhajayajal|dhajayajal]] || [[word:dhajayashal|dhajayashal]] || [[word:dhajayakal|dhajayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhajayathatha|dhajayathatha]] || [[word:dhajayajaja|dhajayajaja]] || [[word:dhajayashasha|dhajayashasha]] || [[word:dhajayaka|dhajayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhajayathan|dhajayathan]] || [[word:dhajayajan|dhajayajan]] || [[word:dhajayashan|dhajayashan]] || [[word:dhajayakan|dhajayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhajayathaoro|dhajayathaoro]] || [[word:dhajayajaoro|dhajayajaoro]] || [[word:dhajayashaoro|dhajayashaoro]] || [[word:dhajayakaoro|dhajayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
